# gcore_cloud_file_share_access_rule (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "gcore_cloud_file_share_access_rule" "example_cloud_file_share_access_rule" {
  project_id = 1
  region_id = 1
  file_share_id = "bd8c47ee-e565-4e26-8840-b537e6827b08"
  access_mode = "ro"
  ip_address = "192.168.1.1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `access_mode` (String) Access mode
Available values: "ro", "rw".
- `file_share_id` (String) File Share ID
- `ip_address` (String) Source IP or network

### Optional

- `project_id` (Number) Project ID
- `region_id` (Number) Region ID

### Read-Only

- `access_level` (String) Access mode
Available values: "ro", "rw".
- `access_to` (String) Source IP or network
- `id` (String) Access Rule ID
- `state` (String) Access Rule state
Available values: "active", "applying", "denying", "error", "new", "queued_to_apply", "queued_to_deny".
